title: Open AI overtakes the fenced frontier as the rules harden - TCR 06/18/26
description:
Z.ai's MIT-licensed GLM-5.2 jumped 11 points to lead the open-weight rankings at 51 while Claude Fable 5 sits export-blocked, the NSA concluded Fable 5's guardrails can be stripped as the White House demanded Anthropic make every jailbreak impossible, and a sworn Pentagon filing states xAI's Grok helped fire 2,000 munitions at 2,000 targets in 96 hours.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-june-18-2026/

0:00 The Anthropic export standoff and the NSA guardrail finding
3:05 The Pentagon discloses Grok in the kill chain
6:19 GLM-5.2 leads the open frontier as Fable 5 sits offline
8:27 The robot-training data race opens up
11:22 The UK facial age scan for asylum seekers
13:33 Synthesis and Closing

This episode covers the hardening Anthropic export-control standoff and the NSA guardrail finding, GLM-5.2 overtaking the open frontier as Fable 5 sits offline, the Pentagon's Grok kill-chain disclosure and the DOJ shielding xAI's unpermitted turbines, Nvidia's ENPIRE harness and the robot-training data race, and the UK's plan to scan asylum seekers' faces for age.

The week the US tried hardest to hold one capability still, the capability found its level the way water does. The directive that pulled Claude Fable 5 offline hardened into a demand experts call unachievable, after the NSA concluded the model's guardrails can be disabled and the White House said it can only return if jailbreaks are made impossible. On the same days, Z.ai's freely downloadable GLM-5.2 jumped 11 points to lead the open-weight index and is competitive with proprietary GPT-5.5 on agentic work, distributed across a dozen hosts no order can reach. The selective stringency sharpened: a sworn Pentagon filing places xAI's Grok inside the Iran-strike kill chain while the DOJ moves to shield its maker's 57 unpermitted turbines as a war asset. Underneath the override fights, accountability accreted from below - journalists exposed the UK's flawed facial-age system before it touches a child, Nvidia's ENPIRE harness let coding agents teach robots overnight, an open 130,000-trajectory dataset dismantled the robot-data bottleneck, and six rival firms pooled vulnerability patching into shared defense.

Additional Reading:
- WIRED: The White House Wants Anthropic to Block All Jailbreaks - That May Not Be Possible: https://www.wired.com/story/the-white-house-wants-anthropic-to-block-all-jailbreaks-that-may-not-be-possible/
- Artificial Analysis: GLM-5.2 Is the New Leading Open-Weights Model: https://artificialanalysis.ai/articles/glm-5-2-is-the-new-leading-open-weights-model-on-the-artificial-analysis-intelligence-index
- Ars Technica: Trump Admin Helps xAI Fight Pollution Lawsuit, Says Military Needs Grok for War: https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2026/06/trump-admin-helps-xai-fight-pollution-lawsuit-says-military-needs-grok-for-war/
- WIRED: The UK Will Use Facial Age Estimation on Asylum Seekers: https://www.wired.com/story/facial-age-estimate-uk-asylum-seekers/
- Shared Sapience - The Last Difficult Decade: 2025-2035: https://sharedsapience.com/the-last-difficult-decade-2025-2035/
